patterns: indicators of depression, anxiety, sad mood - sad/apathetic/anxious appearance - crying/tearfulness. 0 = Indicator not exhibited in last 30 days, 1 = Indicator of this type exhibited up to five days a week, 2 = Indicator of this type exhibited daily or almost daily (6, 7 days a week), (-) = Unknown, (sp) = Blank.
171 E1N E1N_REPEAT_MOVES (E1N) Repetitive Physical Movements CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: indicators of depression, anxiety, sad mood - sad/apathetic/anxious appearance
